title: Limit function parameter count
description: Functions with too many parameters are difficult to use and maintain. Developers must track parameter positions and roles, increasing cognitive load and the risk of errors. Long parameter lists often indicate poor design.
recommendation: Group related parameters into structs or split functions into smaller, focused functions.

noncompliant.description: Functions with too many parameters are difficult to use, understand, and maintain.

compliant.description: Group related parameters into structs and use patterns like builder or functional options for complex configurations.
